mapper.select: select b.*, m.nickname from board b, member m WHERE b.member_id = m.member_id
SELECT b.*, m.nickname FROM board b, member m WHERE (title LIKE #{pattern} OR content LIKE #{pattern}) AND b.member_id = m.member_id
SELECT b.*, m.nickname FROM board b, member m WHERE b.member_id = m.member_id AND b.board_id = #{board_id}
mapper.update: UPDATE board SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE board_id = #{board_id}
UPDATE board SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, updated_date = NOW() WHERE board_id = #{board_id}
